summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Laboratory Marketplace demo website. Backend APIs are fully functional (100% pass rate) with 18 seeded services, 8 users, 5 orders. Frontend public pages work well. Dashboard pages have data access pattern bugs that were identified and fixes applied to source files, but require rebuild to take effect (production mode).

minor.issue: Service cards on listing page show '¥起' without actual price - frontend display issue, API returns correct priceMin/priceMax

ui_bugs.issue: Page shows error 'Error occurred' - FIXED: data.data.data access pattern
Page shows error 'Error occurred' - FIXED: data.data.data access pattern
Stats show 0 and ¥0.00 despite API returning correct data - likely client-side hydration/session issue
Stats show ¥0.00 for wallet despite API returning 50000 - same hydration issue
Stats show 0 for all values despite API returning correct data

integration_issues.issue: Dashboard pages show 0/empty values on initial load - APIs return correct data but frontend doesn't display it

issues: Service cards show '¥起' without price value - should show priceMin

action_items: REBUILD REQUIRED: Run 'yarn build' to apply fixes to enterprise/members and admin/referrals pages
Investigate dashboard stats not displaying - APIs work but frontend shows 0 values (may be related to same data access pattern issue)
Fix service card price display on /services page - should show priceMin value instead of just '¥起'
Check client-side session/cookie handling for authenticated dashboard pages
critical_code_review_comments: API response structure inconsistency: Some APIs return {success, data: [...]} while others return {success, data: {data: [...], page, totalPages}}. Frontend code needs to handle both patterns.
Dashboard pages may have hydration issues - server-side rendered with 0 values, client-side fetch may not be updating state properly
seed_data_creation: Database seeded with 18 testing services, 8 users, 5 orders, 3 RFQs, 1 company, 1 laboratory
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs all working correctly. Fixed data access pattern bugs in enterprise/members and admin/referrals pages. Dashboard pages (user, admin, enterprise) show 0 values despite APIs returning correct data - this appears to be a client-side state/hydration issue that needs investigation. Rate limiting is active (10 requests/minute for login).
rca_of_the_issue: Root cause of referrals/members page errors: API returns nested structure {success: true, data: {data: [...], page, totalPages}} but frontend was accessing data.data directly instead of data.data.data for the array. Fixed by updating the data access pattern in both pages.
